Today's politicians confronted with information technologies tackle complex decision-making problems.
order make sustainable decisions, profound analysis societal problems possible solutions (policy options) needs performed.
this policy-analysis process, different stakeholders involved.
Besides internal direct advisors policy makers (policy analysts), external experts from different scientific disciplines support evidence-based decision making.
Despite alleged importance scientific advice policy-making process, observed that scientific results often used.
this work, concept described that supports collaboration between scientists politicians.
propose science-policy interface that realized including information visualization policy-analysis process.
Therefore, identify synergy effects between both fields introduce methodology addressing current challenges science-policy interfaces with visualization.
Finally, describe three exemplary case studies carried European research projects that instantiate concept this approach.
Research presented here partly carried within project "urbanAPI" (Interactive Analysis, Simulation Visualisation Tools Urban Agile Policy Implementation), Policy-Making Life Cycle) funded from Framework Program European Commission, call identifier: FP7-ICT-2011-7, under grant agreement 288577 (urbanAPI), 288147 (ePolicy), started October 2011.

known work diverse range theatre, film, television productions, often portraying villainous roles character parts.
Curry rose prominence with portrayal Frank-N-Furter Rocky Horror Picture Show, reprising role originated London Angeles stage productions Rocky Horror Show.
other stage work includes various roles original West production Hair, Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart Broadway production Amadeus, Pirate King West production Pirates Penzance, Alan Swann Broadway production Favourite Year King Arthur Broadway West productions Spamalot.
Curry received further acclaim film television roles, including Rooster Hannigan film adaptation Annie, Darkness fantasy film Legend, Wadsworth mystery comedy film Clue, Pennywise Dancing Clown horror miniseries Long John Silver Muppet Treasure Island.
Curry also gained acclaim voice actor.
roles animation include Hexxus fantasy film FernGully: Last Rainforest, Nigel Thornberry Nickelodeon series Wild Thornberrys, Palpatine Star Wars: Clone Wars.

15-M been most important protest Spanish history since Spain gained democracy 1977.
15-M began 2011 square Puerta Madrid spread rapidly into major cities Spain.
Madrid's public spaces shaped through squatting, protest-camps, marches, strikes, manifestations graffiti.
this study investigate role graffiti 15-M protest: what issues graffiti communicates about communication graffiti formed.
Research based photographed graffiti Madrid between 2012 2014.
Qualitative content analysis hermeneutical close readings were applied research material.
analysis shows that graffiti used protest strategic communication tool.
Most graffiti researched indicates that contents objectives graffiti well planned.
Three major themes were analyzed from research material.
Graffiti exploits public space communicate impact important societal issues.
re-shapes both physical ideological city space.
Graffiti media communicate without censorship control challenge authorities city space state.
Spain, painting graffiti part both political participation citizenship.
*Failure representative politics included graffiti about political legal system, bank crisis, reform public services.
**Global justice included graffiti about anti-imperialism anti-war.
